statement: In every magma, Equation 1347 (`x = y * (((y * z) * w) * w)`) implies Equation 965 (`x = y * ((z * y) * (y * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0477
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op y z) w) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op z y) (op y y)))
